title: [W] Contact or home address of another claimant
pageHeader: [W] Contact or home address of [Full name of another claimant]
pageText: [W] We'll send any correspondence to this address.

additionalClaimantAddress1.required: [W] Enter the first line of the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 100 characters
additionalClaimantAddress1.invalid: [W] Enter the first line of the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 100 characters

additionalClaimantAddress2.required: [W] Enter the second line of the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 50 characters
additionalClaimantAddress2.invalid: [W] Enter the second line of the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 50 characters

additionalClaimantAddressTown.required: [W] Enter a town or city for the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 50 characters
additionalClaimantAddressTown.invalid: [W] Enter a town or city for the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 50 characters

additionalClaimantAddressCountry.required: [W] Enter a country for the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 50 characters
additionalClaimantAddressCountry.invalid: [W] Enter a country for the claimant’s contact or home address - up to 50 characters

additionalClaimantAddressPostcode.required: [W] Enter a postcode. For example, SW1 1AA
additionalClaimantAddressPostcode.invalid: [W] Enter a valid postcode. For example, SW1 1AA
